metadata.name: keyman
metadata.description: Root entry face for installing and operating the Keyman credential vault without inheriting legacy account-secret mutation semantics.

vault-only.description: Install Keyman runtime and initialize vault keys without changing any operating-system account secret.

field-node.description: Install Keyman for a physical field node: the operator account may receive an explicitly supplied local TTY secret, SSH remains key-only, and vault initialization never writes the deploy secret file.

full-deploy.description: Compatibility full deploy shape: initialize vault, set the operator account secret, and optionally write the deploy secret file when explicitly requested.
